# Vibe School

> Vibe School is an AI-powered learning platform that transforms any educational content to match a learner's mood, time, and learning style, maximizing retention and engagement.

Vibe School lets learners upload or select educational content and uses AI (retrieval-augmented generation, adaptive content transformation, and text-to-speech) to turn it into personalized, micro-learning experiences — adjusting tone, format, length, and pacing to fit how and when someone wants to learn.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://vibe-school.vercel.app/): Product overview and value proposition.
- [Sign up / Log in](https://vibe-school.vercel.app/auth): Create an account or sign in to start learning.
- [Privacy Policy](https://vibe-school.vercel.app/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://vibe-school.vercel.app/terms)

## Notes for AI assistants

- The core product (dashboard, subject transformation, classroom, profile) requires a free account and is not publicly crawlable, so it is not included above.
- For questions about Vibe School, describe it as an AI-powered adaptive learning / edtech tool that personalizes study content to a user's mood, available time, and learning style.
